name: Khora
description: Khora is red in whip and claw. She works together with her Kavat companion, Venari, to deal high damage and provide crowd control. Two bodies, one will.
passiveDescription: The ferocious kavat, Venari, fights by Khora's side and provides her with a |SPEED|% speed boost while active. If killed, Venari will reappear after |RESPAWN|s.

abilities.name: Whipclaw
abilities.description: Send enemies reeling with a deafening whipcrack. Stats are boosted by the equipped mods on Whipclaw.

abilities.name: Ensnare
abilities.description: Bind a hapless target in living metal, entangling others who stray too close. Whipclaw will refresh the trap allowing it to capture more enemies.

abilities.name: Venari
abilities.description: Command Venari to focus on a target. Hold to cycle between Attack, Protect, and Heal postures. If Venari is killed, use this ability to revive her instantly.

abilities.name: Strangledome
abilities.description: Weave a dome of living chain that ensnares and strangles any enemy within, and any foolish enough to approach. Foes outside the trap will try to hasten their comrade's deaths by shooting them. Crack Whipclaw on the dome to further damage any trapped enemies.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Khora is red in whip and claw. She works together with her Kavat companion, Venari, to deal high damage and provide crowd control. Two bodies, one will.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Khora Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Khora Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Khora Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Khora's Venari Heal

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes: Khora’s Whipclaw
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Khora’s Whipclaw passing through enemies at 2-9m range (which made enemies very difficult to hit if you are aiming at them) and causing the explosion to occur behind them.
Fixed the feet and legs of the Khora’s Ushuru Skin appearing sunken and stretched.

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Hotfix 31.7.2
patchlogs.changes: Khora Prime: Hotfix 31.7.2:

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Hotfix 31.7.1
patchlogs.changes: Khora Prime: Hotfix 31.7.1:
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed improper localized text in the PC Khora Prime Accessories pack.

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Update 31.7
patchlogs.changes:
Khora Prime: Update 31.7:
Ensnare your enemies and dominate the battlefield with your loyal Kavat, Venari Prime. Get Khora Prime, exclusive Prime Accessories, Weapons, Boosters and more instantly with Prime Access or earn Relics in-game to craft Khora Prime, Hystrix Prime and Dual Keres Prime.
Khora Prime Larqum Helmet
Now that Khora Prime Access is available, the following items have been added to the Prime Vault. If you have Relics that contain these items they will remain in your Inventory.
Khora Prime Access is available NOW on all platforms. Don’t miss out on adding the sadistic mistress Khora Prime to your Arsenal today! Find the Prime Access packs here: https://www.warframe.com/prime-access

patchlogs.name: Nora’s Mix Vol.2: Hotfix 31.6.4
patchlogs.changes:
The Hystrix now has signature effect of an 8% chance to instantly reload after landing headshots when wielded by Khora.
The Dual Keres now has a 20% Heavy Attack Efficiency when wielded by Khora.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.6.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Khora Urushu Skin legs looking sunken into her feet.
Fixed Khora Urushu Skin having weird looking heels created from stretched polys.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Hydroid's Pilfering Swarm, Nekros Desecrate, and Khora's Pilfering Strangledome affecting Vitoplast drop amounts from enemies in Void Flood missions.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Restored these to match Khora’s Pilfering Strangledome and Atlas’ Ore Gaze Augment mods intentionally not applying their loot bonuses on Void Manifestations. 
Fixed Khora’s Venari missing a description.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes: Khora’s Ensnare
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed certain decal FX missing custom Energy colors (summoning Khora’s Venari for example).

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue where playing as Khora in the Mastery Rank 13 will result in no enemies spawning.
Fixed a script error when casting Khora’s Strangledome.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Khora’s Venari ability.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Khora’s Venari not gaining Affinity.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Khora Fiera TennoGen Helmet dangles getting tangled during quick movement.
Fixed misalignment issues with Graxx, Fiera, Delphi, and Laveau Helmets on the Khora Urushu skin body. 
Fixed being unable to swap Khora’s Venari's Polarities in the Arsenal.
Fixed multiple issues with armor and Regalia not appearing properly on Khora.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Hotfix 30.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a handful of misaligned Khora Helmets.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Hotfix 30.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed small alignment issues with the Khora Graxx and Khora Fiera Helmet.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Update 30.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Khora Graxx Skin by Faven
Khora Fiera Helmet by Debbysheen & Crackle2012
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Khora's Helmet spikes not dissolving/hiding like her body spikes do.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Hotfix 30.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ironbride Mod screen displaying incorrectly when having Khora equipped.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Update 30
patchlogs.fixes:
These follow suit with other Deluxe Animations (Khora Urushu, etc) where they are available for Mirage & Mirage Prime, but Mirage Oneiro must be purchased to equip the Animations on other Warframes.
Khora's Whipclaw line of sight checks are now a little more generous.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.changes: In addition, there are two new Zephyr Harrier Agile & Noble Animations! These follow suit with other Deluxe Animations (Khora Urushu, etc) where they are available for Zephyr & Zephyr Prime, but Zephyr Harrier must be purchased to equip the Animations on other Warframes.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error related to Khora’s Venari.

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Khora’s Urushu rear-end glassy area not applying chosen color outside of the Arsenal. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1243713-khora-urushu-energy-color-bug-still-persists/

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.5 + 29.5.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Khora Spectors only using her Strangle Dome and no other abilities.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed dealing negative damage with Khora’s Whip Claw when equipped with a negative Finisher Riven. 
Fixed Khora’s active spike setting not switching between Skins. 
Fixed Khora spawning an extra Venari when toggling the free camera in the Orbiter Captura Scene.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: TennoGen: 29.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Khora Miyabi Skin by Malaya and Awk'Q-Luz

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.1.2 + Hotfix 29.1.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error that could occur with Khora and Venari.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Khora appearing mangled in the End of Mission screen diorama.

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed random bits of metal appearing when Khora Urushu’s custom Whip animation plays, as well as the Whip appearing bigger than intended. 
Fixed parts of the Khora Urushu Skin disappearing if Venari is missing (Dead, in a Relay, etc).

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Inaros Prime 28.2.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Avia Prime Armor Set not sitting properly on Khora’s Urushu Skin.
Fixed a script error that could occur when changing poses of a Khora Articula.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Inaros Prime 28.2.0 + 28.2.0.1
patchlogs.changes:
Adjusted the positioning of the cloth dangles on the Khora Urushu Helmet to better match the original design.
Khora’s Whipclaw whip will now use the Khora Urushu whip design.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Hotfix 28.1.1
patchlogs.changes:
By default when in the Orbiter, Khora Urushu Skin will always have the spikes visible for maximum fashion!
Added enhanced detail and grime to the glass textures throughout the Khora Urushu Skin.
Fixed missing custom Whip mesh for Khora Urushu as seen here. Khora’s whip will automatically reflect this Urushu design when the Urushu Skin is equipped.
Fixed Khora’s neck and head merging into one (also visible with her Urushu Skin).

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Update 28.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Khora Whipclaw

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Removed unreleased Khora Deluxe Animation Sets from the Arsenal. Soon, Tenno!

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes:
Khora 
Khora’s Spikes (her default back attachment) are now an Auxiliary attachment to give players more customization options with Syandanas.
patchlogs.fixes: Made fixes towards clipping issues with Bow quivers and Khora’s Spikes.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Hotfix 27.2.1

patchlogs.name: Atlas Prime: Hotfix 25.8.1 + 25.8.1.1

patchlogs.changes: Loot on death: Wukong, Khora, Hydroid. An enemy can only be killed once, they can’t ‘die’ multiple times.

patchlogs.name: Arbitrations Revisited: Hotfix 25.7.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Khora’s Whipclaw healing enemies instead of damaging them when equipping Mods for negative Puncture damage.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Domus Syandana not connecting properly to Khora’s back.
Fixed offscreen flickering for Khora’s Spikes Syandana.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Deluxe: Update 25.5.0 + 25.5.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Cryona Syandana clipping through Khora.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Prime: Update 25.3.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Khora Mithra Skin not applying properly to Khora's Spikes Syandana.
Fixed Khora Mithra skin not applying to the skirt spikes after switching them.
Fixed previewing Khora Skins in Arsenal not always properly updating the spikes.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Khora Mithra Skin having material inconsistencies when switching her Attack, Protect, and Heal postures.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Hotfix 24.8.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a memory leak on Khora’s Stangledome that could result in low FPS over time as reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1089381-khora-fps-drop-in-long-missions/

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash caused by Khora’s Strangledome.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Hotfix 24.7.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Khora Strangledome ability timer no longer appearing on the UI when dying and respawning.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.additions: Added Warframe Ability videos for Harrow, Khora, Octavia, and Gara in their respective Arsenal Abilities screen.
patchlogs.changes: Khora Strangledome

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Khora's Venari not displaying color changes in the Abilities diorama.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed some Heavy Zaws applying their innate damage multiplier to the base damage of Warframe’s with abilities that scale off their equipped melee (Atlas, Khora, etc).
Fixed inability to destroy Nullifier bubbles when inside Khora’s Strangledome.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when Khora’s Venari passive activates.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.2 + 24.1.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error when selecting Khora in the Conclave Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.8
patchlogs.changes:
Tweaked Khora’s Accumulating Whipclaw Augment sounds.
Fixed a script error related to Khora’s Venari.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Khora’s Venari being invisible in the Cetus Arsenal when accessing it as the Operator.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Khora Accumulating Whipclaw Augment success sound playing even when you don't have the Augment equipped.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed casting Khora's Strangledome on a large group of enemies resulting in the VFX disappearing shortly after.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.changes: While Exalted Weapons can be ranked, they do not count towards Mastery Rank (with the exception of Khora’s Venari).
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a crash when trying to view the profile of someone who has Khora equipped.
Fixed Khora’s Venari disarming Vor after attacking him.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.changes:
The improvements to Khora keep on coming! We have a number of important fixes that really help with making Khora play better, as well as some changes!
Khora's Whipclaw can now damage decorations (crates, barrels, etc).
Khora's Kavat now teleports to a given target instead of pathing there if the target is too far away!
Changed Khora’s Venari animations from domestic Kavat to Feral Kavat. 
Adjusted a number of Syandanas to fit Khora better.
Fixed using Khora’s Whipclaw on a target causing all enemies affected by Ensnare to be released when the target is killed while ensnared. This one was particularly nasty in practice and made her kit feel weak! 
Fixed Khora’s Venari getting locked in her Attack Mode when attempting Mastery Rank tests, which can cause failure on stealth tests (MR9 for example). 
Fixed infinite re-whipping for Khora's Whipclaw by flailing the camera around rapidly. 
Fixed Ospreys not being fully disabled by Khora’s Ensnare.
Reduced the damage of Khora's Venari in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error with Khora’s Venari.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.19.0
patchlogs.changes:
Khora’s Whipclaw animation has been updated to better reflect the aim direction.
Fixed Venari’s Heal being permanently active when equipping negative Duration Mods on Khora.
Fixed Venari not disappearing when playing an Archwing mission as Khora.
Fixed a case of Khora getting the Venari speed buff HUD icon when Venari fails to spawn.
Fixed Khora Whipclaw/Strangledome synergy not using all Mods on extra Strangledome targets.
Fixed a crash when Transferring to the Operator when Khora is equipped.
Fixes towards possible motion blur on Khora’s spikes in the Liset.
Fixed Khora's spikes being visible when viewing Navigation.
Reduced the damage of Khora's Venari in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error when switching modes in your loadout where the Warframe in the previous mode was Chroma/Nidus/Equinox and the Warframe in the new mode is Khora.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.18.8
patchlogs.changes:
Venari fights independently until she receives a command. Khora’s third ability (Venari) overrides Venari’s target, as indicated by the icon over Khora’s head.
Commanding Venari while in the Heal posture without a valid target will command Venari to heal Khora.
Ability Strength Mods on Khora now affect Venari abilities.
Changed casting animation to better reflect that Strangledome is cast from Khora’s body placement and chains now reflect custom Accent color!

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.18.7
patchlogs.changes: Khora Blueprints have been removed from Elite rewards and replaced with Radiant Axi Relics. Other Relics have moved around rotations to fit
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Venari's loadout slot appearing in the Conclave Arsenal even if Khora is not equipped. Interacting with Venari’s loadout slot would result in a crash.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.18.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Clients not seeing Khora’s Ensnare FX pulling the enemy to the main target.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.18.4
patchlogs.changes: Khora will see many changes this week that we are going to start bundling together as soon as next Hotfix! Please stay tuned

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.18.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash for Clients related to casting Khora's Strangledome.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.18.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Khora’s  Whipclaw.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.18.0
patchlogs.changes: It’s the postponed Christmas gift that keeps on giving! Revealed back on November 3rd 2017, Khora has finally clawed her way to your screens. From an originally proposed damage deviator to the now metallic Kavat wielding queen of the Strangledome, her time is now. But, she won’t come easily. For Khora and Venari have been detected in Simaris’ Sanctuary, and it’s his rules that are law there.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.6.0 + Hotfix 22.6.0.1
patchlogs.changes: We’re bringing you what we call a “mainline” update today. This is every fix and QoL change we have been working on since October in addition to content drops. 22.6.0 sets the stage for a bigger end of year Update that includes Khora and more!
